01 / 12 — ALTAN NEXUS

Concept & Idea

The conceptual origins and philosophical framework of Altan Nexus.

Back to Portfolio ALTAN NEXUS — 01 / 12
Design Philosophy

The Idea

Altan Nexus begins with a question: what does it mean to build at the edge of a river in a city still discovering its identity?

The concept draws on three founding ideas — threshold, confluence, and luminance. Each is a spatial organiser: the podium as threshold, the atrium as confluence, the facades as luminance devices.

Threshold Confluence Luminance Identity Landscape

Early massing — mountain silhouette study

ENFirst volume study against the Skopje mountains.
SQStudimi i parë volumetrik kundrejt maleve.
МКПрва волуметриска студија спрема планините.

"The building does not stand against the river — it extends toward it, drawing the city and the landscape into a single continuous gesture."

Threshold

The podium is a permeable urban gateway — open, porous, connected to the riverfront promenade.

Confluence

The central atrium is the spatial heart — where programmes meet, daylight descends, and the city becomes visible.

Luminance

Loggias, woven screens, and reflective surfaces give every floor a direct relationship with light and sky.

Form Generation

Design Evolution

Six-step evolution: initial mass → interlocking volumes → terraced roof → cylindrical void → green canopy → final form

ENFrom raw mass to architectural refinement in six steps.
SQNga masa fillestare deri te rafinimi arkitekturor.
МКОд почетна маса до финалното архитектонско усовршување.
Process Sketches

Ideation

Aerial — atrium placement & roof geometry

ENEarly exploration of the central void.
SQEksplorimi i hershëm i boshllëkut qendror.
МКРана истрага на централниот отвор.

Site sketch — building within urban context

ENBuilding in relation to streets and urban fabric.
SQNdërtesa në raport me rrugicat dhe indin urban.
МКЗградата во однос на улиците и урбаното ткиво.

Aerial perspective — full site with parking, courts, and landscape

ENFull site with sports courts and green landscape.
SQSiti i plotë me fusha sportive dhe gjelbërim.
МКЦел терен со спортски игралишта и зеленило.

Circulation diagram — pedestrian flows and landscape continuity

ENPedestrian and vehicle movement across the site.
SQLëvizja këmbësore dhe ajo e automjeteve.
МКПешачко и возилско движење низ теренот.
Street Level

Perspective Studies

Early perspective — glass curtain wall & entrance canopy

ENFirst study of the glazed facade and diagonal entry.
SQStudimi i parë i fasadës dhe hyrjes diagonale.
МКПрва студија на стаклената фасада и дијагоналниот влез.

Refined perspective — structural grid & public plaza

ENStructural grid, public plaza and landscape integration.
SQRrjeta strukturore, sheshi publik dhe gjelbërimi.
МКСтруктурна мрежа, јавен плоштад и пејзажот.

Atrium detail — the central void as spatial heart

ENCylindrical atrium with descending light well and spiral sequence.
SQAtriumi cilindrik me sekuencën spirale të dritës.
МКЦилиндричен атриум со спирална светлосна секвенца.
Project Data
Project TypeMixed-Use Development
LocationSkopje, North Macedonia
Site Area18,400 m²
Total GFA120,000 m²
Height148 m (38 floors)
Design Year2024
Completion2027 (projected)
